text.title: Lessons Learned Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator rejects artefacts that violate the schema or any forbidden pattern.

example.note: blameless must be true; observations empty; action items missing owner/due/acceptance; published_at empty.

list.item: action_item without owner, due_date, or acceptance_criterion.
observations empty (post-hoc retro with no continuous log).
individual names in observations.signal or themes (blameless violation).
